idea-plugin.name: Memory Leak Detector
idea-plugin.description:
Real-time Memory Leak Detection for IntelliJ IDEA

Monitor JVM memory usage and detect potential memory leaks in your application.

Features:

  • Real-time Monitoring - Watch heap and old generation memory usage in real-time
  • Interactive Chart - Visual representation of memory usage over time
  • Automatic Leak Detection - Detects rapid memory growth patterns
  • GC Analysis - Tracks GC events and efficiency metrics
  • User Confirmation - Prompts user before invoking System.gc()
  • Leak Simulation - Built-in simulation to test detection
  • Configurable Thresholds - Customize detection sensitivity
  • Detailed Logging - Complete history of GC events and alerts

How to Use:

  1. Open View → Tool Windows → Memory Monitor
  2. Click Start Monitoring to begin tracking memory usage
  3. Watch the chart and statistics for unusual growth patterns
  4. When rapid growth is detected, a dialog will ask if you want to run GC
  5. Use Simulate Leak to test the detection system

Detection Thresholds:

  • Rapid Growth: >10% growth per interval
  • Warning: >20% growth from baseline with low GC efficiency
  • High Risk: >50% growth with very poor GC efficiency
  • Critical: Old gen increasing after each GC cycle

Configure thresholds in Settings → Tools → Memory Leak Detector
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 1.0.0 (Initial Release)

  • Initial release of Memory Leak Detector
  • Real-time heap and old generation monitoring
  • Automatic leak detection with multiple severity levels
  • Interactive GC confirmation dialog
  • Memory chart with zoom capability
  • GC event tracking and efficiency analysis
  • Leak simulation for testing
  • Configurable detection thresholds
  • Tool window with statistics panel and log viewer
  • Keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Alt+M to start monitoring)

Known Issues

  • First GC after baseline may show negative efficiency (normal)
  • Some GC events may be duplicated in log

Planned Features

  • Heap dump analysis on leak detection
  • Export memory data to CSV
  • Email notifications for critical alerts
  • Integration with IntelliJ Profiler

action.description: Start monitoring memory usage for leaks
Run a memory leak simulation to test detection
Request JVM to run garbage collection
